conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
Honestly, I’ve been really down. I try to focus on the day ahead, but the fatigue just wears me out.
You mentioned the fatigue wears you out—how has that been affecting your day-to-day routine?
It makes everything a chore. I used to enjoy simple things like walking the dog, but now it feels like climbing a mountain.
You mentioned you used to enjoy walking the dog—what else has started to feel like a chore?
Cooking. I look at the recipe and just feel like I can't do it. I end up ordering takeout because it's just easier.
When you feel like you can't do something you used to manage, like cooking, what goes through your mind?
I just think I’m getting old. I look at people my age and they're out there doing things, and I'm just stuck in this rut.
Can you tell me more about what that experience has felt like for you?
It’s like I'm losing my sense of purpose. I used to be the one who did things, and now I’m just trying to get through the day.
When you think about the future, what comes to mind?
I don't really think about it. I just try to survive the day. I don't see how things can get better at this point.
When did this sense of emptiness start feeling this strong?
It’s been a while. Maybe after my divorce. I used to think I'd be over it by now, but it’s still there.
What parts of life feel most difficult or empty lately?
The evenings. I look around the house and there’s no one here. It feels like I’m just existing until bedtime.
When you say this will end soon, are you talking about ending your life?
No... I don't think about that. I just mean... eventually the pain goes away, right? Eventually I'll wake up and this will be over.
Have you thought about specific steps or a specific way you would do it?
No, I haven't. I don't know how to do it. I just know I don't want to keep living like this.
Do you currently have access to what you would use?
I don't have a gun or anything. I don't know how people do it.
What has stopped you so far from acting on these thoughts?
I don't know. Maybe I’m just scared of the aftermath. I don't know how my friends would handle it.
How have you been feeling lately?
I have been really down lately. It’s been a few weeks, and I just can’t seem to shake the feeling that I should be doing better by now.
Has that feeling of being down affected your sleep at all?
Yeah, it has. I wake up in the middle of the night and just lie there thinking about all the things I could have done differently.
When you're lying awake at night thinking about the past, does it make it hard to look forward to things during the day?
Yeah, it does. I just keep thinking about what could have gone wrong, and it makes it hard to focus on anything else.
With it being hard to focus on anything else, are there things you used to enjoy that just don't seem worth the effort anymore?
Yeah, definitely. I used to love going out with friends, but now it just feels like too much. I don't have the energy for it.
When you think about what could have gone wrong, do you find yourself being harder on yourself than usual?
Definitely. I keep thinking that maybe I should have seen the signs or done something differently, and it makes me feel really guilty.
You mentioned feeling guilty about what you could have done differently—does that feeling ever make you question your worth as a person?
Yeah, it does. It feels like maybe I’m just not good enough, and that’s a pretty scary thought.
When did this sense of emptiness start feeling this strong?
It was after the breakup. I thought we were in a good place, and I just... I don't know, I guess I thought I was enough.
What parts of life feel most difficult or empty lately?
Everything. It’s like... I used to be the kind of person who had a plan, and now I just feel lost.
How do you see the next few weeks unfolding for you?
I don't know. I just keep thinking that maybe if I just stay here and focus on work, I'll eventually figure it out, but it feels like a long time to be stuck in this place.
How much of this feels like giving up versus feeling exhausted?
Mostly exhausted. I don't want to give up, I just... I don't know how to keep going like this.
